title: verbascum × karpatii
intro: Verbascum × karpatii, also known as the Carpathian mullein, is a hybrid plant species within the Verbascum genus, characterized by its large, bright yellow flowers and velvety leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The health benefits of Verbascum × karpatii include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote a good night's sleep. Verbascum × karpatii is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health concerns.
